name: Applesauce Snack Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Pour snack cake mix into an ungreased 8 or 9 inch square baking pan; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine egg, oil, applesauce, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves, beating with a fork until blended.
4. Stir the mixture into the snack cake mix until smooth and well combined.
5. Stir in chopped nuts and raisins.
6. Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool on a rack.
